category_sources: source_facts.description says SiLK is a collection of traffic analysis tools; official CERT NetSA page describes SiLK as network flow collection, storage, and analysis tools.
display_name_sources: Official CERT NetSA SiLK page uses the display name SiLK and expands it as System for Internet-Level Knowledge.
docs_sources: Official CERT NetSA SiLK site provides documentation index, manual pages, and reference guide.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official CERT NetSA downloads page publishes release tarballs, and no official source-control repository was identified.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables and official CERT NetSA documentation describe command-line tools for NetFlow/IPFIX and network security traffic analysis.
